x-component.description: Annotates text units with Microsoft Translator matches or/and creates a TM from them. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

category.description: Category code if accessing a trained system
category.title: Category

tmxPath.description: Full path of the new TMX document to create

configPath.description: Full path of the properties file listing the engines
configPath.title: Engine mapping

markAsMT.title: Mark the generated translation as machine translation results

maxEvents.description: Number of events to store before sending a query
maxEvents.title: Events buffer

threshold.description: Score below which matches are not retained
threshold.title: Threshold

annotate.title: Annotate the text units with the translations

fillTarget.title: Fill the target with the best translation candidate

fillTargetThreshold.description: Fill the target when the best candidate is equal or above this score
fillTargetThreshold.title: Fill threshold

onlyWhenWithoutCandidate.title: Query only entries without existing candidate

sendTmx.title: Send the TMX document to the next step

useTargetPrefix.title: Add a prefix to the translation candidate copied in the target

targetPrefix.description: Text to use as the target prefix
targetPrefix.title: Target prefix
